element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Player learns opponent patterns before power punches available
Essential for surviving opponent combos; directional blocking (head/body) required
Enables counter-punching; cannot punch while dodging/ducking
Enables special knockout moves (hooks, uppercuts, rapid punches)
Increases punch speed/power; lost on knockdown; requires sustained offense
Player must observe and adapt to unique attack patterns; vulnerability windows vary per opponent

element_introduction_order.first_appears: Minor Circuit when power meter full
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Risk/reward: slight execution delay vs. significant damage
Consecutive punches trigger opponent stun animation; window for instant knockdown emerges

element_introduction_order.element: Stamina depletion mechanics (both boxer health bars)
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Knockout at stamina depletion; three knockdowns = TKO loss
Opponents faster, more aggressive; require mastery of all prior mechanics
Opponents employ complex pattern combinations; anti-piracy unlock gate
Final challenge tier; unlocked only after World Circuit completion

typical_relief_triggers: Opponent entering stunned/dizzy state (freeze frame advantage)
Power meter full (player gains offensive momentum)
Reaching Power-Up red status (enhanced punch speed/power)
typical_tension_triggers: Player stamina meter decreasing from hits
Loss of Power-Up status on knockdown
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Cyclical offensive/defensive rhythm driven by player power meter accumulation vs. opponent stamina attrition. Tension escalates as stamina pools deplete; relief emerges through stun windows and power meter payoff. Each opponent's unique attack timing creates distinct rhythm variations. Three-minute time limit adds meta-tension.

difficulty_curve.early_game: Minor Circuit: foundational opponents teach core mechanics (jab, guard, dodge, power meter) in low-stakes environment. Players learn observation-based pattern recognition.
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Major Circuit: opponents employ more aggressive patterns, faster attack sequences, and complex stance-dependent guarding. Requires flawless execution of evasion + counter mechanics.
difficulty_curve.late_game: World Circuit: peak difficulty opponents combine all prior mechanics with multi-hit combos and deceptive pattern variations. Special Circuit unlocks post-completion as ultimate challenge.
notable_spikes: Transition from Minor to Major Circuit (opponent speed/aggression increase)
World Circuit opening matchups (pattern complexity reaches critical mass)
Special Circuit opponents (mechanics mastery required; minimal room for error)

notable_level_patterns.description: Each opponent has fixed, learnable attack sequences with vulnerability windows. Player success depends on identifying tells and exploiting open guard spots. Difficulty escalates through increased pattern complexity and speed, not through RNG or stat inflation.
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Minor Circuit vs. Major/World Circuit opponents

notable_level_patterns.description: Victory achieved through sustained offensive pressure (filling power meter) while managing defensive resource depletion. Three-knockdown TKO loss condition creates high-stakes knockdown moments.
Dodging/ducking followed immediately by counter-punch deals significant damage and builds power meter efficiently. Encourages active defense rather than passive blocking.
notable_level_patterns.example_level: All circuits (emphasized more in later opponents)

notable_level_patterns.description: Consecutive punches trigger invisible dizzy meter; opponent stun animation freezes timer and creates guaranteed knockdown window. Critical for efficient knockouts; some opponents require initial knockdown to enable first-round KO.
